subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and that He Who hath come upon clouds of light bearing the name of Ali is manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و ان الذی اتی علی ظلل الانوار باسم علی لظهوره و
subcodes.subjects: @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God
